original_snippet_context: Report on the activities of the finance commission of the Chamber of Deputies.
relevant_quote: Ficou assignado pela maioria da commissão o projecto instituindo a caixa de conversão, do qual é relator o illustrado representante de Minas.
justification: This is a factual report on the commission's approval of the project, without expressing any opinion on the Caixa itself or its details.
